name: Zingy Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, place all ingredients except chicken and blend for 30 seconds.
2. In a small saucepan, pour the blended sauce mixture and heat for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
3. Remove from heat and dip chicken one piece at a time, turning to thoroughly coat. Reserve sauce in refrigerator.
4. Place chicken on prepared grill with skin side up, about 8 inches from the heat.
5. Grill, turning every 10 minutes, for about 50 minutes or until fork tender and juices run clear.
6. Brush generously with reserved sauce during the last 20 minutes of grilling.
7. Watch chicken carefully as egg in sauce may cause it to become too brown.
